title: K-12 HCM Platform Modernisation
problem: A large US K-12 HCM provider needed to unify two aging product lines - Recruiting & Hiring and HR Information System - while maintaining delivery continuity for school districts across the country.
scope: 350+ engineers across USA onshore and India offshore. 6 delivery tracks. Multi-year programme.
led: Full engineering organisation from architecture design through team structure, AI enablement, observability strategy, and cross-geo delivery rhythm.
result: Unified HR product platform on event-driven cloud-native architecture. Operational incidents cut 45%. AI-assisted development adopted across 50+ developers in two geographies.
metric: 30%+ productivity lift via AI guilds. 95% accuracy on AWS Bedrock RAG extraction. 45% incident reduction.

title: Logistics Platform Rebuild
problem: A freight forwarding operator's legacy .NET MVC system could not scale to handle growing transaction volumes or support the real-time cargo tracking the business needed to stay competitive.
scope: Full platform rewrite covering freight operations, cargo tracking, warehousing, and dispatch across ocean freight, air freight, and household goods relocation.
led: Architecture design and technology selection (Blazor WASM/Server hybrid). Pre-sales architecture proposal that secured the client engagement and defined the delivery baseline.
result: New platform handling 500K+ daily transactions with real-time SignalR cargo tracking, 45% load time reduction, and a modern dispatcher and customer-facing portal.
metric: $2M+ modernisation investment secured. 500K+ daily transactions at launch. 45% load time reduction.

title: Agribusiness Management Platform
problem: A North American agribusiness software provider needed a cloud-native replacement for a legacy VB.NET WinForms desktop system covering agronomy, grain operations, grower self-service, and accounting - with a field-ready mobile experience.
scope: Multi-module platform serving 50K+ agricultural professionals across North America. Four product modules delivered concurrently.
led: Architecture and delivery from serverless AWS design through cross-platform mobile, data warehouse, ETL pipelines, and integration testing framework.
result: Full cloud-native platform on AWS serverless supporting $5M+ annual operations, with offline-first mobile for field teams and 80%+ automated test coverage across 20+ microservices.
metric: $5M+ annual operations supported. 50K+ mobile users. 4.5+ average mobile store rating. 80%+ test coverage.
